author: lOrm
content: Issue calls for replacing HttpTransport with an MCP-Streamable-HTTP-spec-compliant implementation (Accept: application/json, text/event-stream multiplexed, SSE demuxing on POST responses). Not addressable in a cleanup pass: protocol-compliance gap requiring SSE chunk parsing on the response side and rework of src/mcp.rs:297-337 request flow. Multi-day work. Parent audit #523.
